title: asclepias oxytropis
intro: Asclepias oxytropis, also known as Antelope Horn or Antelope Ears, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Asclepias oxytropis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Asclepias oxytropis can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
